scan_output: Vulnerability openscap_048 not found in single-rule scan (possibly fixed)

llm_verdict.message: The **nodev** mount option has been added to the `/dev/shm` tmpfs entry in `/etc/fstab` and the filesystem has been remounted, bringing the system into compliance with the **mount_option_dev_shm_nodev** security rule.
